description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, light wood-textured exterior walls, and large rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. The property is enclosed by a light gray fence and features a spacious green lawn with stepping stones leading to the main entrance. A detached double garage with a flat roof sits adjacent to the house, connected by a paved driveway and a small covered walkway. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor furniture, a barbecue grill, and several mature trees, including a prominent pink-blossomed tree. The main entryway is sheltered by an overhang and features a wide door, while the overall design emphasizes clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, wood-textured exterior, large windows, a detached garage, and landscaped yard with patio and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, stepping stone path, and a large tree in the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, backyard patio with furniture, and a pink-blossomed tree.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio area, barbecue grill, and the arrangement of windows and doors on the back facade.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the lawn, fence, and the rear corner of the house with minimal landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Wide main door under a flat overhang, accessed by stepping stones, with a covered porch area and minimal decorative elements.
